description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from fastrack. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Made of pure leather in a matte finish Textile lining Contrast stitch detailing on the cover with embossed brand name on the front One main chamber for keeping cash Convenient woven chambers for storing cards and coins Genuine Leather embossed inside CareWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
